ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(NOT(AND(TEXT(StageName) = 'Closed Lost',ISCHANGED(StageName))), TEXT(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.SBQQ__Status__c) = 'Approved', BEGINS(SBQQ__PrimaryQuote__r.NATT_Quote_Record_Type_Developer_Name__c, 'NATT_Units'), TEXT($User.UserType) <> 'Standard', NOT (OR( ISCHANGED(NATT_Billing_Address__c), ISCHANGED(NATT_Shipping_Address__c) )) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The primary quote was already approved. If you need to edit it, contact your admin.
